item.title: Great Mathematicians and Physicists
item.description: A list of 50 brilliant minds who have significantly advanced our understanding of the world and contributed to making it a better place! Name Years Country Major Contributions Pythagoras 570-495 BC Greece Best known for the Pythagorean theorem, which relates the sides of a right triangle. His contributions also extend to musical theory and philosophical concepts of numbers and their relationships. Euclid circa 300 BC Greece Often referred to as the 'Father of Geometry,' Euclid's work 'Elements' is one of the most influential works in the history of mathematics, laying out the foundations of plane geometry. Nicolaus Copernicus 1473-1543 Poland...

item.title: Space-Time
item.description:
Lorentz transformation
\[\begin{equation}\label{lorentz} \begin{aligned} x' &= \frac{x-ut/c^2}{\sqrt{1-u^2/c^2}} \\ t' &= \frac{t-ux/c^2}{\sqrt{1-u^2/c^2}}\\ y' &= y \\ z' &= z \end{aligned} \end{equation}\]
Rotation
\[\begin{equation}\label{rotation} \begin{aligned} x' &= x\cos(\theta) + y\sin(\theta) \\ y' &= y\cos(\theta) - x\sin(\theta) \\ z' &= z \\ t' &= t \end{aligned} \end{equation}\]
Equation \eqref{lorentz} is beautiful. So is equation \eqref{rotation}.
References
The Feynman Lectures on Physics First Year Photos (1961‑62) Lecture 17 Lorentz transformation on Wikipedia

item.title: Appointed to the Rogers Commission investigating the Space Shuttle Challenger disaster
item.description: Appointed to the Rogers Commission investigating the Space Shuttle Challenger disaster

item.title: National Medal of Science awarded by President Carter

item.title: Awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics for contributions to quantum electrodynamics
item.description: Awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics for contributions to quantum electrodynamics

item.title: The Feynman Lectures on Physics begins publication
item.description: The Feynman Lectures on Physics begins publication

item.title: Delivered 'There's Plenty of Room at the Bottom' talk at Caltech APS meeting

item.title: Joined the faculty at California Institute of Technology
